## 📝 Description

Please include a summary of the change and which issue is fixed. Include relevant motivation and context. List any dependencies that are required for this change.

Closes # (issue number)

---

## 🛠️ Type of Change

- [ ] **Feature** (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] **Bug Fix** (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] **Database Migration** (any schema change, seeds, or data updates)
- [ ] **Refactor** (code cleanup, performance optimization, no behavior change)
- [ ] **Documentation** (updates to API specs, Swagger, README)
- [ ] **Chore** (CI/CD, build tools, package/dependency updates)

---

## 🔒 Security & Data Considerations

- [ ] **Database Migration**: Tested rollback, syntax verified.
- [ ] **API Spec**: OpenAPI/Swagger updated.
- [ ] **Environment Variables**: Added or modified variables are documented in the configuration sample.
- [ ] **Authentication/Authorization**: Enforced correct access controls/rules.

---

## 🧪 Testing and Verification

Please describe the tests that you ran to verify your changes. Provide instructions so we can reproduce.

- [ ] **Local Verification**: Verified API endpoint response locally (Postman / cURL).
- [ ] **Unit Tests**: Automated tests run and passed.
- [ ] **Integration/DB Tests**: Verified database queries execute correctly.

---

## 📋 Quality Checklist

- [ ] My code follows the style guidelines of this project.
- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my own code.
- [ ] I have commented my code, particularly in hard-to-understand areas.
- [ ] I have updated the documentation accordingly.
- [ ] My changes generate no new compile or lint warnings.
- [ ] New and existing unit tests pass locally with my changes.
